allow: Bash(node -e 'const fs=require\("fs"\);const h=fs.readFileSync\("alternatives/remove-bg/index.html","utf8"\);const b=[...h.matchAll\(/<script type="application\\/ld\\+json">\([\\s\\S]*?\)<\\/script>/g\)];let ok=0;for\(const[,j]of b\){JSON.parse\(j\);ok++}console.log\(ok+" blocks OK"\)')
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('✓ 标签已更新，共', len\(d['names']\), '个：'\); print\('  ', ', '.join\(d['names']\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('OK', len\(d['names']\), 'topics:'\); print\(' ', ', '.join\(d['names']\)\)")
